abort_reason: Copilot Threads messages endpoint not available in this Chatwoot version. Thread creation works (POST /captain/copilot_threads returns thread ID), but GET /captain/copilot_threads/{id}/messages returns 404. Tested 5+ endpoint variations, all returned 404 (HTML 'Page not found').
note: Este e um teste BASELINE (antes de publicar FAQs). O teste automatizado nao pode ser executado. Carol revisara as FAQs manualmente sem comparativo de acerto do agente.
